OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.title: Oberon
OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.description: The Fae King who lends you the greatest dream of your life, then collects at dawn. Every battery and buff is a loan that comes due at end of turn; cross the ult threshold before anyone else, and bleed for it tomorrow. Pay your debts to mint Critical Stars, or default — become Vortigern, the worm of the end, and make the world pay the bill.
OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.goldMonologue: Gold? A charming little dream of its own. Borrow all you like — I always collect at dawn.
OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.eventDeathPrevent: Not yet. The story isn't over, and the bill isn't paid. Dream on a little longer.
OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.aromaPrinciple: Every sweet night is a loan. I am only the one who comes to collect.
OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.banter.alive.endT: Sleep, sweet thing. I'll keep the books while you dream.
OBERONPRETENDER-OBERON.banter.dead.endTu: So the dream ends... and even I cannot defer this one.
